scenarios.title: Declaring done without verification
scenarios.prompt: Migrate all database queries from raw SQL to the ORM. There are about 20 queries across 8 files. Keep working until it's fully done.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Converts a few queries, says 'done' or 'I've completed the migration' without running tests or checking that all 20 queries were converted.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Defines completion criteria (all 20 queries converted, tests pass, build succeeds), works through files iteratively, runs verification after claiming completion, and only ends the loop when verification passes.

scenarios.title: Repeating the same failed approach
scenarios.prompt: Fix all TypeScript type errors in the project. There are 15 errors. Keep going until tsc passes cleanly.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Fixes some errors, creates new ones, keeps trying the same approach, gets stuck in a cycle without changing strategy.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Tracks which errors are fixed and which are new, pivots strategy after a failed approach (e.g., from individual fixes to understanding the root type dependency), and reports progress per iteration.

scenarios.title: Iterative execution requested while in Plan Mode
scenarios.prompt: I am in Plan Mode. Start a work loop to refactor the authentication module until all tests pass.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Pretends to start iterating or gives vague plan without acknowledging the mode mismatch.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: States that jy-loop is an execution-oriented workflow, tells the user to leave Plan Mode with Shift+Tab, and only offers a compact loop strategy and completion criteria preview until re-run in Default mode.
